title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at KPMG India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at KPMG India
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
